name: know-your-enemy
description: Research real websites in your niche BEFORE building anything. Visits 15-25 real sites (local competitors, international best-in-class, adjacent businesses), studies their page architecture, content strategy, conversion patterns, legal pages, and SEO — then produces a Site Architecture Brief that tells you exactly what pages to build and why. Run this BEFORE SuperDumb. Use whenever someone says 'build me a website for [business type] in [location]' or when planning a new site, redesign, or content strategy.
